name: image-gallery
visual_summary: image-gallery is a image gallery UI component from the pinesui corpus. It provides reusable other behavior and styling for React or web UI screens.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: image-gallery
Description: image-gallery is a image gallery UI component from the pinesui corpus. It provides reusable other behavior and styling for React or web UI screens.
Style: rounded, utility-styled
Interactions: animated, hover
Tags: gallery, image, other, pinesui

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
// elements/image-gallery.html
<div x-data="{
        imageGalleryOpened: false,
        imageGalleryActiveUrl: null,
        imageGalleryImageIndex: null,
        imageGallery: [
            {
                'photo': 'https://cdn.devdojo.com/images/june2023/mountains-01.jpeg',
                'alt': 'Photo of Mountains'
            },
            {
                'photo': 'https://cdn.devdojo.com/images/june2023/mountains-02.jpeg',
                'alt': 'Photo of Mountains 02'
            },
